data.title: CoreWeave partners with Perplexity to power AI inference workloads, aiming to enhance user experience.(Nasdaq: CRWV)
data.description: CoreWeave, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRWV) from Livingston, N.J., has partnered with Perplexity for a multi-year agreement to enhance inference workloads on CoreWeave Cloud and develop new services. CoreWeave Cloud, advertised as The Essential Cloud for AI™, will support Perplexity in launching AI-native products and services designed for real-world environments. This partnership aims to improve inference performance and reliability, directly impacting user experience. The collaboration will see the two organizations pilot innovative services across their platforms.

data.title: Integrity Viking Funds partners with FIS to modernize investment accounting infrastructure. Technology can handle complex strategies for asset managers of all sizes.
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida, a renowned financial technology company, FIS®, revealed that Integrity Viking Funds has opted for FIS Investment Accounting Manager for upgrading its investment accounting setup. This collaboration showcases FIS’ proficiency in providing top-notch technology solutions for managing intricate investment approaches, catering to asset managers of various scales. The move aims to address the challenges posed by rising complexities in investment strategies, ensuring cost-effectiveness and operational simplicity for all sizes of asset management firms.

data.title: Avetta named to Hackett Group's 50 to Know list for procurement technology, chosen from 220 global solutions.
data.description: In Lehi, Utah and Houston, Avetta®, a global leader in ensuring work readiness across supply chains, has been included in The Hackett Group®'s prestigious 2025-2026 50 to Know list. This list is a yearly evaluation of the procurement technology sector, highlighting emerging, top, and long-standing solution providers influencing the procurement technology industry. Avetta was chosen from about 220 solution providers globally, proving its significance in the market.

data.title: CrowdStrike holding Day Zero Threat Research Summit on August 30 - September 1, 2026 at Mandalay Bay Hotel in Las Vegas.
data.description: CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) is hosting the Day Zero Threat Research Summit, an exclusive event for the global threat intelligence community to explore adversary tradecraft and enhance cyber defense strategies. The summit is set for August 30 – September 1, 2026, at Mandalay Bay Hotel and Resort in Las Vegas, coinciding with Fal.Con 2026. This summit aims to gather experts and discussing the latest advancements in cybersecurity.

data.title: Gordian Bio releases preprint on scalable in vivo screening platform for disease biology in South San Francisco.
data.description: A biotech company based in South San Francisco, California, Gordian Bio, has recently published a preprint showcasing their innovative in vivo mosaic screening platform. This platform is designed to establish causal disease biology and is scalable for various applications. This development marks a significant breakthrough in biotechnology research and has the potential to revolutionize the understanding and treatment of diseases. The company's achievement highlights their commitment to advancing scientific knowledge and pushing the boundaries of technology.

data.title: Claritev Corp (NYSE: CTEV) to join investor events in March 2026 for better healthcare affordability.
data.description: Claritev Corporation, a technology, data, and insights company dedicated to enhancing healthcare affordability, transparency, and fairness, shared that its leadership will engage with investors at upcoming events in March 2026. The events include the Mizuho Virtual Healthcare Technology Conference 2026 on March 5, 2026, featuring virtual 1x1 meetings. Additionally, there will be a Q&A Webcast Hosted by Nephron Research. Claritev's stock is listed on the NYSE under the symbol CTEV.

data.title: Adjust migrates 30+ live games from Tripledot Studios seamlessly, avoiding disruption in user acquisition or data infrastructure.
data.description: In San Francisco, a prominent measurement and analytics firm, Adjust, revealed the seamless transfer of over 30 active games from Tripledot Studios to its measurement platform. This intricate migration, which is considered one of the most challenging in casual gaming history, was accomplished without causing any interruptions to current user acquisition processes or data systems. Tripledot Studios, established in 2017 in London, is a key player in the casual gaming sector, renowned for popular games like Solitaire and Woodoku.

data.title: VCI Global launches Malaysia's first NVIDIA-powered AI GPU computing center, strengthening its regional AI infrastructure with Intelli-X Enterprise LLM Platform.
data.description: The implementation of an AI compute backbone has bolstered VCI Global's status as a regional leader in AI infrastructure ownership and operation. This development facilitates digital transformation for small and medium enterprises (SMEs) and government entities.

data.title: Armlogi Holding Corp. launches AI-enabled Smart Fulfillment Network to optimize multi-node distribution costs in warehouses.
data.description: In Walnut, California, on March 4, 2026, Armlogi Holding Corp. unveiled its AI-enabled Smart Fulfillment Network™. Operating under Nasdaq as BTOC, Armlogi is a U.S. firm specializing in warehousing and logistics services. The innovative system aims to enhance order routing efficiency across the company's multi-state warehouse network. By leveraging AI technology, the network seeks to lower average shipping expenses and enhance delivery efficiency to benefit customers.

data.title: CytomX Therapeutics, Nasdaq: CTMX, to disclose 2025 financial results on March 16, 2026, before US market opens. Conference call to follow.
data.description: CytomX Therapeutics, Inc., a prominent player in the area of masked, conditionally activated biologics, will be disclosing its complete financial performance for the year 2025 on March 16, 2026. This information will be revealed before the opening of U.S. markets. Subsequently, the company is scheduled to conduct a conference call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET / 5:00 a.m. PT following the announcement. CytomX Therapeutics, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol CTMX.

data.title: FOREWARN partners with Greater Tulsa Association of REALTORS® to provide safety services for 5,000+ agents in Oklahoma.
data.description: Oklahoma's largest REALTOR® Association has partnered with FOREWARN to provide their 5,000+ real estate professional members access to proactive agent safety services.

data.title: Genius Group (NYSE: GNS) to release full year 2025 results on March 9, 2026 in Singapore; will host investor webcast.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, Genius Group Limited (NYSE American: GNS), a prominent AI-powered, Bitcoin-centric education company, is set to disclose its complete fiscal year 2025 financial outcomes on March 9, 2026, before the trading day begins.

data.title: CN launched America250 celebration with 2 locomotives honoring US' 250th anniversary, traveling across CN’s U.S. rail network.
data.description: Homewood, Illinois - CN has officially kicked off its America250 festivities by introducing two special locomotives, honoring the 250th anniversary of America’s independence. The locomotives symbolize the core values of the nation: independence and innovation. These locomotives will journey through CN’s U.S. rail network, covering a vast area from the Gulf Coast to the Midwest and reaching into the Great Lakes region. Besides transporting goods, they will also spread the message of America250 to various communities nationwide.

data.title: Galecto grants equity awards to 4 new employees under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4), approved by Compensation Committee.
data.description: On March 2, 2026, Galecto, Inc., a biotechnology firm focusing on transforming care for individuals with hematologic conditions, revealed the provision of equity awards to four recently hired, non-executive staff members. The inducement grants, sanctioned by Galecto’s independent Compensation Committee, served as significant incentives for these employees to join the company, as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). The company is listed on the NASDAQ under the symbol GLTO.

data.title: Linkhome introduces new Buy Before Sell program in Irvine, CA, aiding homeowners in purchasing next property before selling current home.
data.description: Yesterday, in Irvine, California, Linkhome Holdings Inc. introduced its latest initiative, the Buy Before Sell program. This program, created by the AI-powered real estate and fintech platform, is aimed at aiding homeowners in buying their next property before selling their current one.

data.title: LM Funding America's Bitcoin treasury stands at 354.7 BTC worth $23.8 million ($1.11/share) as of Feb 28, 2026.
data.description: As of February 28, 2026, the Bitcoin treasury consists of 354.7 BTC, worth $23.8 million, equivalent to $1.11 per share.

data.title: ABM partners with Philadelphia Phillies & Citizens Bank Park to improve services with technology-based solutions.
data.description: An agreement has been reached to introduce ABM's technology-driven ABM Performance Solutions model to a renowned baseball stadium known for its fan-friendly atmosphere. This collaboration will enhance the stadium's operational efficiency and overall performance thanks to ABM's innovative approach. The agreement is set to bring cutting-edge solutions to optimize the stadium's functions, benefiting both the management and the enthusiastic fans.
